summary: Refreshed PU-009 after reviewer and architecture-governance feedback. The adversarial and agent-native artifacts exist and are non-empty. The project-local product reviewer failed the artifact-write contract after the required retry, but its valid mailbox finding was fixed: external-state claim support now blocks missing or non-current freshness and non-passing resultStatus. summary: Implemented the P0 GAP-002 closeout hardening after adopting the 2026-05-26 audit and Codex ecosystem operational review. Required PR/CI checks now count as closeout proof only when their normalized conclusion/state is SUCCESS, PASSED, or PASS. Required NEUTRAL and SKIPPED results block tests_passed and ci_green instead of becoming proof; required CANCELLED and TIMED_OUT results fail those claims. Optional neutral/skipped checks remain diagnostic when required checks pass, and the no-explicit-required-check path still preserves the existing missing test evidence behavior. Intent review findings were adopted before implementation by adding claim-builders to the scope and rerunning adversarial plus agent-native intent re-review.
